headline: Is Nucor Corporation (NUE) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is NUE a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Nucor Corporation on Crack The Market’s Substack by Ozeco. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on NUE. Nucor Corporation’s share was trading at $253.40 as of June 8th. NUE’s trailing and forward P/E were 25.24 and 18.28 respectively according to […]
